questions.question: Starting from the blue ball hopper with the solved board configuration, describe the complete path of the first blue ball.
questions.answer: The first blue ball drops from (2,-1), rolls onto crossover at (5,1), then continues through crossovers at (5,2) and (5,3), then ramps: ramp_right at (4,4), ramp_right at (5,5), ramp_right at (6,6), ramp_right at (7,7), ramp_right at (8,8), reaching the right lever.

questions.question: What is the output pattern after running the machine?
questions.answer: The pattern is blue, red, blue, red, blue, red... alternating.

questions.question: How many times do the blue and red ball paths cross each other?
questions.answer: The paths cross each other three times.
